metadata.title: Skill Hub增长计划与PR提交策略
metadata.objective: 通过Awesome List PR提交和竞品策略借鉴实现用户增长

task1_awesome_lists.name: awesome-ai-agents
task1_awesome_lists.relevance: 高 - 专注AI Agent资源整理，与Skill Hub技能中心定位高度契合
task1_awesome_lists.pr_difficulty: 中 - 组织维护，有明确贡献指南

task1_awesome_lists.name: Awesome-LLM
task1_awesome_lists.relevance: 高 - 涵盖AI Agent框架和工具，与Skill Hub直接相关
task1_awesome_lists.pr_difficulty: 低 - 个人维护，合并较快

task1_awesome_lists.name: awesome-llm-apps
task1_awesome_lists.relevance: 高 - 应用导向，Skill Hub可作为开发者工具平台被收录
task1_awesome_lists.pr_difficulty: 中 - 高星项目，审核较严

task1_awesome_lists.name: awesome-langchain
task1_awesome_lists.relevance: 高 - LangChain生态工具，Skill Hub支持多种AI框架

task1_awesome_lists.name: awesome-ai-developer-tools
task1_awesome_lists.relevance: 中 - 开发者工具定位匹配，但规模较小

task2_pr_templates.unified_pr_description:
### Add Skill Hub to Awesome List

**Skill Hub** is an open platform for discovering, sharing, and using AI skills (MCP tools, integrations, and reusable prompts).

- **Website:** https://skillhub.ai
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/skillhub/skillhub  (if applicable)
- **Current Scale:** 5,562+ curated skills and integrations
- **Key Features:**
  - 5,562+ curated AI skills covering coding, data, productivity, and more
  - Community-driven contributions with skill validation and rating system
  - Searchable by framework (LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGPT, etc.)
  - Open API for developers to integrate skills into their agents
- **Why it fits this list:** [Customize per list - e.g., it is the largest curated directory of AI agent skills]

This PR adds Skill Hub under the [appropriate_section] section, following the list's contribution guidelines.

---

**Checklist** (Customize per list):
- [x] I have read and understand the [Contribution Guidelines]
- [x] The entry follows the existing format (title, description, link)
- [x] Skill Hub is a mature and notable resource
- [x] Placeholder comment if needed: This is part of my 1 contribution per day
title_suggestions: Add Skill Hub - AI Skill Discovery Platform (5,562+ skills)
Add Skill Hub - curated AI skills directory for agents

customization_notes.e2b-dev/awesome-ai-agents: Highlight agent orchestration and MCP integration. Mention 5562 skills.
customization_notes.Hannibal046/Awesome-LLM: Focus on LLM application layer and integration ecosystem.
customization_notes.Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps: Emphasize practical, ready-to-use skills and community contributions.
customization_notes.kyrolabs/awesome-langchain: Highlight LangChain-compatible skills and framework support.
customization_notes.ColinEberhardt/awesome-ai-developer-tool: Position as developer productivity tool for AI agents.

competitors.name: awesome-selfhosted

glowup_strategies.description: 使用 awesome-selfhosted-data + 自动化脚本维护收录条目，实现去中心化的社区贡献流程。Skill Hub可借鉴其自动化审核和标准化数据格式。
分离展示层(awesome-selfhosted)和数据层(awesome-selfhosted-data)，降低维护成本，方便第三方集成。Skill Hub可考虑将收录数据API化。
通过30万+Stars的品牌效应建立行业标杆。Skill Hub应在GitHub上提升项目可见度，争取进入Awesome官方列表。

actionable_insights: 建立自动化收录流程，减少对人工审核的依赖
提供机器可读的数据格式(JSON/YAML)供第三方集成
创建独立的'awesome-skillhub-skills'展示仓库提升GitHub曝光

competitors.name: toolify.ai

glowup_strategies.description: toolify.ai通过海量工具收录和自动生成的SEO页面获取自然搜索流量。每个工具都有独立页面，覆盖大量长尾关键词。Skill Hub应为每个skill生成独立SEO页面。
通过'今天最热门的AI工具''本周新增'等榜单制造内容更新和社交传播点。Skill Hub可推出'本周最热技能''新增技能榜单'等。
精细的行业分类(700+分类)和多维度筛选(免费/付费/API支持等)提升用户留存。Skill Hub应扩展分类维度和筛选能力。

actionable_insights: 为每个skill创建独立SEO落地页，覆盖长尾搜索词
推出'每日/每周新增'和'趋势榜'板块，持续更新内容
增加多维度分类和筛选(价格/框架/使用场景)

competitors.name: VoltAgent/awesome-agent-skills

glowup_strategies.description: 通过GitHub Stars和Forks建立社群共识，利用PR机制让社区自主贡献。高Stars本身就是最佳信任背书。
'awesome-agent-skills'直接对应搜索关键词，SEO优势显著。Skill Hub应考虑创建同名或高度相关的GitHub仓库。
与特定Agent框架(如VoltAgent)绑定推广，利用框架的用户基础实现冷启动。

actionable_insights: 创建官方的'awesome-skillhub'或'awesome-agent-skills'仓库争夺关键词
激励用户Star/Fork，利用GitHub算法提升推荐权重
与主流Agent框架建立官方合作关系，获得背书和互相引流

actions: 准备5个Awesome List的PR文案和具体修改
监控PR反馈并及时调整文案
上线SEO技能独立页面和趋势榜功能
分析PR合并率和流量增长数据
根据竞品分析优化网站分类和筛选功能
开展与Agent框架(如LangChain/AutoGPT)的合作推广
扩展至更多垂直领域Awesome List(如awesome-maker, awesome-coding-tools)
制定下阶段增长目标(KPI: GitHub Stars > 1000, 日均UV增长30%)
